title: Zack Bossan
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Zack Bossan '''is an author who wrote the backstory of [[Tannon Praji/Legends|Tannon Praji]] and co-wrote [[Ottegru Grey]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

Also a frequent poster on the Star Wars message boards. His aliases are "Nex: The T is Hott!!" on [[StarWars.com]], ''[http://boards.theforce.net/members/1223102/ Imperial_Commandant]'' on [[TheForce.net]] and [[User:Jerrycurl|Jerrycurl]] on [[Wookieepedia]].

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*{{DB|character|tannonpraji|Praji, Tannon}} - August [[2005]]
*{{DB|character|ottegrugrey|Grey, Ottegru}} (co-written by ''magicofmyth2'' and named by [[Nathan O'Keefe]]) - April [[2006]]

==External links==
